hero.subtitle: INSULATION TECHNOLOGY OF THE FUTURE
hero.title: Temperature is Under Control with Marterm
hero.desc: We breathe life into buildings with new generation aerogel-based insulation solutions, bringing energy efficiency together with aesthetics. Build tomorrow today with our 100% eco-friendly and A1 class non-combustible materials.

products_page.title: Products — Marterm | Natural Insulation Solutions
products_page.desc: Marterm natural insulation products: goat hair and polyester fiber blend for roof, wall, residential, and industrial insulation solutions.
products_page.hero_desc: Patented technology designed with the power of our national asset, goat hair. Our natural insulation family provides 60% higher thermal and acoustic performance compared to competitors.
products_page.variants_desc: Developed with different thickness options, Marterm felts offer flexible solutions for heat, sound, and structural comfort.
products_page.area_roof_desc: Superior thermal insulation for attics, under/between rafters, on concrete roofs, and terrace applications.
products_page.area_wall_desc: Applications under exterior cladding, behind interior drywall, and between double walls.
products_page.area_floor_desc: Applications under screed, under parquet, underfloor heating systems, and suspended ceilings.
products_page.area_acoustic_desc: Sound absorption solutions for wooden slatted acoustic panel systems, studios, and meeting rooms.
products_page.area_prefab_desc: Lightweight and flexible solutions for prefab structures, container homes, tents, and caravan insulation.
products_page.area_public_desc: Healthy, non-carcinogenic insulation in hospitals, schools, mosques, and cultural centers.
products_page.area_marine_desc: Ideal solution for yacht, boat, and ship insulation with its moisture resistance and lightweight structure.
products_page.area_concrete_desc: Increasing mechanical strength with a 0.8–1.5% additive ratio to mortar and concrete mixtures.
products_page.specs_desc: We combine the power of nature with modern engineering.
products_page.spec_breath_d: Provides freshness and healthy environments by maintaining moisture balance
products_page.spec_uv_d: Maximum sound isolation with porous fiber structure
products_page.science_p1: Goat hair, as seen under an electron microscope, has a relatively thick fiber diameter and a scaly outer surface. This feature causes sound waves to experience high resistance and suffer greater energy loss while traveling through goat hairs. The scaly keratin structure, which is more prominent and rougher than other staple fibers, increases the surface area of the goat hair, making the flow path of sound waves more complex and increasing flow resistance; this leads to higher sound absorption, especially at middle and high frequencies.
products_page.science_p2: This approach, which forms the basis of the acoustic performance of goat hair nonwoven surface panels, has been developed as a result of R&D studies based on scientific principles by Marterm and is offered as a non-flammable, patented product with 60% higher performance compared to its competitors.
products_page.science_img_desc: The scaly outer surface of goat hair under an electron microscope
products_page.comp_desc: Comparison test results conducted in the accredited laboratory of Gaziantep University.
products_page.health_i1_d: Does not contain any harmful chemicals or carcinogenic substances.
products_page.health_i2_d: Does not cause allergies or irritation; safe for children and sensitive skin.
products_page.health_i3_t: Does Not Emit Dust or Particles
products_page.health_i3_d: Does not require a mask or gloves during application.
products_page.health_i4_d: The natural keratin structure prevents the formation of bacteria and fungi.
products_page.health_i5_d: Naturally balances ambient moisture with a 15% hygroscopic moisture capacity.
products_page.health_i6_d: Can be used safely between -40°C and +120°C.
products_page.cta_desc: Our expert team is with you to determine the most suitable product and thickness for your project.

products_page.science_img_alt: Scaly keratin structure of goat hair under electron microscope
products_page.science_caption_d: Under the electron microscope, the scale structures on the surface of the goat hair fiber are clearly visible. These structures are among the key factors increasing sound absorption performance.

about_page.title: About Us — Marterm | Insulating the Future
about_page.desc: At Marterm, inspired by nature, we produce innovative, sustainable and healthy insulation solutions.
about_page.hero_desc: Inspired by nature, we produce sustainable, eco-friendly, and health-conscious insulation solutions. At Marterm, we protect not just buildings, but the future itself.
about_page.story_p1: We were established with the aim of bringing a breath of fresh air to the insulation sector, placing energy efficiency and sustainability at the core of our operations. In a time when our planet faces climate crises, we are proud to offer a completely natural, recyclable, and healthy alternative to synthetic products that harm the environment.
about_page.story_p2: By conducting our R&D studies in the accredited laboratories of Gaziantep University, we discovered the superior acoustic and thermal insulation capacity of our national asset, goat hair. By combining this discovery with our patented production algorithms, we’ve achieved a performance increase of up to 60% compared to traditional products in the sector.
about_page.vision_d1: To be the reference point in the insulation sector by bringing the potential of natural materials together with innovation; to build comfortable and secure living spaces while protecting the ecological balance.
about_page.vision_d2: To design high-performance, eco-friendly, and safe products with innovative technologies, offering a green alternative to the building industry.
about_page.vals_i1_d: We reinterpret traditional materials with modern engineering.
about_page.vals_i2_d: Reducing the carbon footprint to leave a cleaner world for future generations.
about_page.vals_i3_d: Creating breathable structures with our carcinogen-free content.
about_page.vals_i4_d: Production aligned with international standards and strict quality control processes.
about_page.cta_desc: Incorporate natural and healthy insulation solutions into your projects to protect both your structure and the environment.
about_page.a1_d: Thermal conductivity, tensile strength, airflow resistance, and sound insulation tests. Comparative performance analysis: Felt vs XPS, Stone Wool, Polyester Felt.
about_page.a2_d: Goat hair vs polyester environmental comparison report. Biodegradability, energy consumption, microplastic analysis, and circular economy compliance.
about_page.story_p3: Today, Marterm felt developed at our production facility is used in many different application areas, primarily roof, wall, floor, and acoustic insulation. Our products, preferred in the construction sector as an eco-friendly alternative, reflect our commitment to protecting both human health and the environment.
about_page.rd_desc: Our production algorithm, developed as a result of comprehensive tests and research conducted in the accredited laboratories of Gaziantep University, maximizes the insulation potential of goat hair, our country's national asset.
about_page.rd_bullet1_d: Accredited tests to ISO 11092, ISO 8301, ISO 9053, and ASTM E 1050 standards.
about_page.rd_bullet2_d: High density and durability achieved with needle-punching fixation technique.
about_page.rd_bullet3_d: Proven superior performance compared to traditional rock wool and polyester felt.
about_page.mission_d1: By utilizing waste goat hair collected from small livestock farmers of Southeast Anatolia, we contribute to the national economy while bringing historical heritage together with modern technology.
about_page.mission_d2: To be the reference point in the insulation sector by bringing the potential of natural materials together with innovation; to build comfortable and secure living spaces while protecting the ecological balance.
about_page.mission_d3: To design high-performance, eco-friendly, and health-conscious products with innovative technologies, offering a green alternative to the construction industry.
about_page.env_desc: Goat hair is one of the insulation materials with the lowest environmental impact compared to polyester.
about_page.fiber_desc: Each fiber carries millions of years of nature's evolutionary heritage.
about_page.f1_d: A unique surface structure that traps sound waves and increases flow resistance.
about_page.f2_d: Balances ambient humidity by absorbing 15% moisture, preventing mold and bacteria formation.
about_page.f3_d: Maintains its form and performance for decades thanks to its natural durability.
about_page.f4_d: Saves space with a structure 40% thinner than rock wool.
about_page.f5_d: Thanks to nitrogen and sulfur content, it has high ignition resistance and is non-flammable.
about_page.f6_d: 100% naturally sourced, biologically degradable, and recyclable structure.
about_page.social_desc: Marterm doesn't just produce insulation materials; it creates social and environmental responsibility throughout the value chain from production to distribution.
about_page.s1_d: Waste goat hair collected from small livestock farmers both provides additional income to these producers and gains value.
about_page.s2_d: We apply environmentally sensitive production processes with the goal of minimum energy consumption and near-zero waste.
about_page.s3_d: Significantly reduces heating and cooling costs in buildings where it is used, providing long-term energy savings.
about_page.s4_d: The R&D partnership maintained with Gaziantep University fuels continuous innovation and product development.
about_page.acad_desc: The performance of our products has been validated in accredited laboratories by leading academics in Turkey.

home_page.keywords: thermal insulation, natural insulation, goat hair insulation, eco-friendly insulation, Marterm, Kahramanmaraş
home_page.og_desc: Manufacturer of natural and eco-friendly thermal insulation materials.
home_page.s1_desc: Increase energy efficiency with natural insulation solutions made from goat hair and polyester fiber blend.
home_page.s2_desc: Achieve far more effective thermal insulation than competitors with our patented technology, lower your energy bills.
home_page.s3_desc: Goat hair is naturally fire resistant. Protect your building and loved ones with B1 class fire safety.
home_page.s4_desc: The high-density felt structure absorbs sound, creating quiet and peaceful interiors.
home_page.s5_desc: Our products made from renewable raw materials are eco-friendly, recyclable, and have a low carbon footprint.
